name: Empty Synchronized Block
description: The code contains a synchronized block with no executable statements inside. While the empty block waits for the lock to become available, it fails to protect any subsequent code from concurrent modification, creating a false sense of thread safety.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node representing a synchronized block that contains no TRANSFORM, EXTERNAL, or STORAGE operations. Look for synchronization constructs whose body is empty, indicating the developer intended thread-safe access but implemented it incorrectly.
